The children who are at odds are willing to bury their egos by fulfilling Abah's last request and finally come back.

programme.title: Giant Panda Yun Chuan and Xin Bao - EP 1
programme.desc: The male giant panda Yun Chuan, now five years old, has a signature skill - eating. His favorite pose is lying down while munching, and no piece of bamboo can escape his jaws. Next door lives Xin Bao, a four-year-old female panda. Since pandas consume large amounts of bamboo daily, even one extra mouth in the same territory could mean food shortages - which is why giant pandas are highly territorial.

programme.desc: Laras and Wisnu are two people who are mortal enemies and never get along. But in order to protect the land and customary forest in Laras' village, Laras and Wisnu must unite to defeat Dayat. Wisnu and Laras are upset because Dayat's company is doing arbitrary things to the villagers during land acquisition. The village land is natural land with good views and a beautiful waterfall. Wisnu is upset because his ancestor's grave was leveled by the ground.

programme.title: Janji Gak Naksir Cewek Cleansing Glowing
programme.desc: Salsa (Soraya Rasyid) fails to go on a vacation to Korea after her family suddenly goes bankrupt. To support herself financially, she works as a cleaner. At work, she meets Al (Masaji Wijayanto) and El (Jeremiah Rakesh), two brothers who often fight. Both fall for Salsa and compete to win her heart.

programme.title: LIGA DANGDUT 2021 - EP 45
programme.desc: 70 Ambassadors from 34 Provinces compete for the Champion of the Largest Dangdut Competition in Indonesia. Best display, spectacular stage.

programme.title: JUARA INDONESIA RAMADHAN - EP 21
programme.desc: "Juara Indonesia Ramadan" is a quiz show testing knowledge and agility in answering questions quickly and accurately.

programme.title: PANJI PETUALANG 911 - EP 6
programme.desc: "Panji Petualang 911" is SCTV’s latest reality show that takes viewers to explore unique animals in the wild.

programme.title: MISS BETAWI & OPPA KOREA
programme.desc: Mona is known as a true Betawi woman, because of her blunt language and her Betawi lifestyle. Once, when Ida was buying vegetables on the street, she was hit by Julian's big motorcycle. Ida got angry at Julian, but the arrogant Julian just drove away. Ida was helped by a kind-hearted guy with narrow eyes, who looked like a Korean. The guy's name was Maman, but before Ida could find out his name, he had to rush off to college.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 141
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Lord Permak Cinta Sat Set Ke Pelaminan
programme.desc: A beautiful girl named Ayu. It is told that Ayu in her daily life works as a traveling dressmaker. That is by using a motorcycle. Ayu is always happy with her independence and simplicity. But suddenly Ayu's life was disturbed by the presence of a handsome boy named Riza. It was told that Riza had to attend a meeting that day. But suddenly his pants were torn, it made him insecure and look for a tailor who was open early in the morning.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 595
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 61
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MISTER BAKPAO VS MISS SINGKONG
programme.desc: Acan accidentally damaged Ajeng's bicycle while going downhill. Ajeng asked Acan to sell all of her cassava while she looked after his bakpao cart. However, before everything was sold, Ajeng left Acan's cart unattended, and some children ate his bakpao without paying. Acan was upset and left Ajeng, taking his cart with him. When Ajeng arrived home, Beno was already there, set to be matched with her. Is Beno the best choice for Ajeng, or is there someone else?

programme.title: Utamakan Keselamatan Jangan Mantan
programme.desc: Dina is assigned to find a match for Deva, a mama's boy who has been dumped by his ex and can't move on. But as time goes by, Deva, who is about to be matched by Dina, slowly harbors feelings for Dina.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 62
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: MINTA HATI DAPAT JANTUNG MINTA PEMBANTU DAPAT JODOH
programme.desc: Ajeng (Bunga Zainal) arrives in Jakarta and is picked up by Marvin (Fero Walandouw), the grandson of Oma Mina (Dini Vitri), her new employer who has just returned from abroad. Oma Mina lives with Toni (Fendy Chow), Marvin’s older brother. Ajeng works as a housemaid, taking care of Oma Mina, from feeding her to preparing her medicine. Marvin and Toni are surprised at how close Ajeng becomes with Oma Mina, as many previous maids quit because Oma Mina was strict and temperamental.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 142
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Cewek Gulali: Dia Yang Bersamaku
programme.desc: Winda, a girl selling cotton candy, is feeling troubled because she has secretly fallen in love with Aris, a man who already has a child. Winda's turmoil grows each day, especially when Aris's child asks if she wants to be their mother. What happens next?

programme.title: MAJU MUNDUR CINTA FITA
programme.desc: Fita was looking for a job to pay off her debts and cover her father's heart disease treatment costs. However, her friend informed her that she had been assigned to replace her father, who used to be a parking attendant at an office managed by Rangga, who was the boss there. However, a unique encounter occurs when Rangga, who is being set up on a blind date by his mother's friend, refuses and chooses to run away.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 143
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Bumbu Cinta Diracik Oleh Rasa Yang Ada
programme.desc: Ratna's bandrek recipe is very special and made with love, resulting in a delicious taste and many customers, with cinnamon spice, as sweet as her face. One day, Ratna lost her cart along with her bandrek, and she chased after it, then hit the thief. However, it turned out that the man wasn't a thief at all, but just a prankster looking for material for his thesis. What happens next?

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 597
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. programme.title: Tikus dan Kucing - EP 11
programme.desc: Menceritakan kisah cinta Mitha dan Jaenal yang tidak mendapat restu ibu bapa masing-masing, kerana ibu bapa mereka sering bertengkar, dan saling membenci.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 14
programme.desc: Dihoskan oleh Dato' AC Mizal, rancangan latah paling kecoh kini kembali dengan musim terbaru. Saksikan kaki latah popular seperti PS Mansur, Eida Moin & Nazia Mustafar menggeletek anda seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza - EP 6
programme.desc: Rancangan berbentuk permainan dan jelajah meredah kampung-kampung bersama selebriti-selebriti sambil melakukan pelbagai aktiviti bersama.

programme.title: Punchline - EP 11
programme.desc: Lebih meriah, lebih kecoh! Saksikan program variasi terbaharu yang menampilkan Dato' AC Mizal beraksi bersama PS Mansur dan tetamu jemputan yang bakal membuat anda tidak kering gusi!

programme.title: Tak Kot Raya - EP 2
programme.desc: Tak Kot Edisi Raya, mempersembahkan selebriti tanah air berhadapan dengan cabaran dalam pelbagai permainan dan misi sambil melakukan aksi berani.

programme.title: NoYa - EP 10
programme.desc: Noya berhasrat untuk membawa semua kegilaan dan gelak ketawa yang telah diukir oleh Aya dan Noreen ke peringkat seterusnya.

programme.desc: Berhibur bersama geng Sepahtu.

programme.desc: Drama komedi tentang sepasang pencuri bertindak menggunakan seekor tuyul untuk mengembangkan jenayah mereka tapi perancangan mereka membawa mereka bertembung dengan pelbagai hantu yang tak disangka.

programme.title: All Stars Buka Panggung Extra Pecah! - EP 3
programme.desc: Bersama hos Ali Puteh, saksikan pelakon hebat bermain permainan melucukan sambil ditanyakan soalan panas yang pasti mencuit hati anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Tabung Gelak Warna - EP 8
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Muka Buku - EP 10
programme.desc: Muka Buku ialah rancangan permainan teka-teki, di mana selebriti perlu meneka antara empat peserta, siapa yang palsu dan siapa yang Muka Buku Sebenar.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Raya Gear 5 - EP 3

programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Jep & Judin - EP 6
programme.desc: Jep dan Judin adik-beradik tiri yang lurus bendul meminati sukan bermotor. Jep mahu jadi Johan Rempit dan Judin mahu menolongnya mencapai mimpi itu.

programme.title: Redah Kasi Pecah Ekstravaganza - EP 7
programme.desc: Rancangan berbentuk permainan dan jelajah meredah kampung-kampung bersama selebriti-selebriti sambil melakukan pelbagai aktiviti bersama.

programme.title: Muka Buku Raya - EP 5
programme.desc: Muka Buku ialah pertunjukan permainan meneka, di mana selebriti perlu meneka antara empat peserta, siapa yang palsu dan siapa Muka Buku Sebenar

programme.title: Sorok - Sorok - EP 6
programme.desc: Sebuah program menarik untuk semua.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Raya Muzikal
programme.desc: Sebuah sketsa muzikal yang mengisahkan kehidupan sekumpulan warga emas yang tinggal di pusat jagaan. Usia tidak menjadi penghalang mereka untuk terus merebut cinta Tipah, seorang janda jelita.

programme.title: Jihan Show S2 - EP 13
programme.desc: Pelawak jelita Jihan, menghiburkan anda dalam Jihan Show musim kedua. Jom bergelak tawa bersama Jihan dan rakannya, Amy Mastura, Syuk dan Zara Zya melakonkan sketsa lucu setiap minggu.

programme.desc: Radhe, a merciless contract killer, falls for simple Jhanvi, who challenges his dark world and forces him to choose between love, redemption, and his violent life. Release Year: 2009 Director: Prabhu Deva

programme.title: Rangrezz
programme.desc: Three friends reunite to help a lover elope, but when the couple separates, they return to teach them a lesson about loyalty and friendship. Release Year: 2013 Director: Priyadarshan

programme.title: Chhoriyan Chhoron Se Kam Nahi Hoti
programme.desc: Determined to become an IPS officer, a young woman fights her traditional father's beliefs, battling society to prove her strength and fulfill her dream. Release Year: 2019 Director: Rajesh Amarlal Babbar

programme.title: Haseena Parkar
programme.desc: The life of Haseena Parkar, sister of India's most wanted fugitive, Dawood Ibrahim, who allegedly headed his crime syndicate in Mumbai. Release Year: 2017 Director: Apoorva Lakhia

programme.title: Acharya
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger enters a corrupt village to fulfill a comrade's last wish, challenging powerful leaders and awakening a fight for justice.

programme.title: Bhoot Returns
programme.desc: Tarun and Namrata move into a grand bungalow with their kids, but terrifying events reveal a dark presence, pushing the family to fight to survive. Release Year: 2012 Director: Ram Gopal Varma

programme.title: Gopichand Jasoos
programme.desc: Detective Gopichand Jasoos tracks stolen diamonds to Goa, but rival hunters close in, forcing him into a clever race filled with danger and twists. Release Year: 1982 Director: Naresh Kumar

programme.title: Luv Ki Arrange Marriage
programme.desc: Luv is in love with Ishika and wants to ask for her hand in marriage. A laughter riot follows when his widowed father falls in love with Ishika's mother. Which couple has a more successful love story?

programme.title: Double Xl
programme.desc: Two plus-size women who are body-shamed, head to London to prove that dreams matter and challenge the societal norms for beauty.

programme.title: Sabhapathy

programme.desc: Maari, a fun-loving rowdy, creates many enemies in his area due to his arrogant but righteous behaviour. Beeja, a dreaded gangster, vows to seek revenge against Maari for killing his brother.

programme.title: The Alibi
programme.desc: Vincent is accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real.

programme.title: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The lives of four individuals are turned upside down after they witness the murder of their friend. They band together to put the alleged killer behind bars, but years later, the imprisoned man seeks revenge, unraveling dark secrets that test their loyalty and survival.

programme.title: The Secrets of Hotel 88
programme.desc: The Secrets of Hotel 88 dives into a gripping story of the estranged Fernandez brothers - Martin, Gio and Kiko - who unexpectedly inherit Hotel 88 following their father's death. Driven by conflicting motives, the three find themselves locked in escalating tension and a brewing family feud.

programme.title: Ngayon at Kailanman

programme.title: Le Code - EP 2
programme.desc: Idriss defends Duval, accused of killing a man trying to steal from him. Legitimate defence? programme.title: Meurtres A Amiens
programme.desc: On a canal amidst the ''hortillonnages'', the floating market gardens of Amiens, a lifeless body is found in a Nautilus-shaped fun-fair gondola. Inspector Monet and his assistant Barnier head the investigation. The victim, a seemingly ordinary woman, was apparently threatened ambitious plans for a Jules Verne theme park.

programme.desc: Whether it's a lake, tree or field, there are always a host of mini-creatures. Often feared, because unknown, we discover just how fascinating they are as we take an immersive visit into their world. Often, and wrongly, underestimated, they play an essential role in the natural cycle of life.

programme.title: Idefix Et Les Irreductibles - EP 41
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: Il Etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 2
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo - EP 19
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 11
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.desc: In 2025, Rome will host the Vatican Jubilee, an important event for Catholics worldwide that takes place every twenty-five years. More than 32 million visitors are expected in the Italian capital, which takes the opportunity to restore and highlight its architectural and cultural treasures.

programme.title: Destination Francophonie
programme.desc: A journey throughout the French-speaking world to explore every corner of the globe! In each country we meet francophones who present, in French, their culture, way of life and commitments. The programme also shines a spotlight on local projects that keep the French language alive, dynamic and constantly evolving.

programme.title: Pilotes De Brousse - EP 1
programme.desc: The pilots of Air Tunilik begin the season with ski-equipped planes. Simon Constant and his team deploy to Lake Pau to open a hydrobase essential for snowmobile expeditions. Between northern lights and critical missions, the daily life of these enthusiasts blends resilience and challenges.

programme.title: Bijoux : Eclats De Reves - EP 4
programme.desc: The symbolism of jewellery, new ways of wearing it and new buying behaviours.

programme.desc: Exploring rural land and culinary traditions! Chef Justine Piluso criss-crosses Nouvelle-Aquitaine to meet men and women in the region to learn about their products, their tastes and the dishes that they prepare.

programme.title: Slam
programme.desc: Three contestants compete on arrow-word grids that they try to fill in by finding the answers to the given clues. But to access the clues, they must first answer questions with a very particular characteristic: the answer is always a letter.

programme.title: Le Telejournal De Radio-Canada
programme.desc: The televised news programme from the Radio-Canada team.

programme.title: Une Brique Dans Le Ventre
programme.desc: In addition to the houses, apartments and lofts of various styles and prices which Cedric Wautier shows us through his many visits, this programme about homes offers legal, practical, technical, energy and aesthetic advice, without forgetting the part about the all-important DIY ''tricks''.

programme.title: Escapades En Suisse Italienne - EP 7
programme.desc: Onsernone and Centovalli, two neighbouring valleys literally enveloped by Mother Nature. But while they have much in common, they differ in terms of history. They have remained in the hearts of those who were forced to emigrate for centuries but returned as soon as they could...

programme.title: L'afrik En Contes - EP 1
programme.desc: Qini Lisseka, the ''nasty king'', is feared like the plague. He is so nasty that he has forbidden anyone to wear anything that looks even remotely like something he owns.

programme.title: Idefix Et Les Irreductibles - EP 42
programme.desc: 52 before JC. The city of Lutecia is occupied by the Romans... Completely? No! A gang of invincible animals led by Idefix resist the invader again and again and its plans to romanise the city.

programme.title: Il Etait Une Fois... Ces Droles D'objets - EP 3
programme.desc: Watches, speakers, toilets... Maestro takes a fascinating look at some of our most everyday objects, both old and new. How exactly to they work? What is their history?

programme.title: Les Nouvelles Aventures De Kaeloo - EP 20
programme.desc: In Super-Cute-Land, Kaeloo, Stumpy, Quack-Quack and Mr. Cat play a new game every day. And for that they love nothing better than making up their own rules and asking loads of questions about the world around them: with this lot you can never be sure of what will happen next!

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 13
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Oum Le Dauphin Blanc - EP 14
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Tout Le Monde Veut Prendre Sa Place
programme.desc: The game where everyone wants to be a winner. One quiz, six candidates and, comfortably installed in his chair, one champion... whom everyone dreams of unseating!

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Enquetes De Region - EP 21
programme.desc: Specialised fairs on Japanese culture are numerous. Manga, animated films, video games and cosplay: a budget that generates huge revenue. In Colmar, a Manga museum, unique in Europe, is about to open its doors. Enough to strengthen the already significant cultural exchanges between France and Japan.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Last Dance
programme.desc: Aged 75 Germain, a contemplative home-body, finds himself widowed and having to cope with his children's somewhat invasive concern about him. Determined to keep a promise made to his wife years earlier, he has to take part in a contemporary dance creation, but without letting the family know.

programme.title: 47 Pouces
programme.desc: One night, seven-year-old Zelie sees her Aunt Clara arrive at the family home. The young woman is sad, has bandages on her wrists and does not leave her room.

programme.title: A La Fontaine
programme.desc: Alice is at a crucial stage of her high school life: she has to determine her future career and choose a university. Stressed, she turns to her favorite teacher and her best friend, Julien. But Julien does not answer her messages.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 5
programme.desc: Julietta is hesitant about including Belinda in the photo shoot she's preparing for her store. Worried about the cost to his family of his new accessibility equipment, Leon finds himself a job.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 6
programme.desc: Ricardo and Leon are alone in the house. Ricardo makes the most of the opportunity to organise a little party with his friends, plus Florence and Doris.

programme.title: Six Degres - EP 7
programme.desc: Florence realises that Leon fancies her and she helps him to go through Francis's archives in search of information about Marianne. Leon discovers that his mother had been hiding an enormous secret.

programme.title: Movie - Koattai Mariamman
programme.desc: Eashwar, an atheist, seeks fortunes by stealing and selling off the golden eyes from the idols of a Hindu deity. However, his wife, who is an ardent devotee of a goddess, tries to save him.

programme.title: Movie - Ellaisamy
programme.desc: Ellaichami is a righteous village chieftain who protects his people. Out of the blue, Kaveri enters Ellaichami's village and turns his life upside down before she reveals her true identity.

programme.title: Movie - Enn Iniya Pon Nilave
programme.desc: Shiva and Rosie are in love and decide to elope. However, they face financial crises and have ego clashes when they start living in an old building amidst fraudsters and prostitutes.

programme.title: Movie - Nyayam
programme.desc: Nyayam is a movie directed by R Krishnamurthy featuring Prabhu, Nalini, Thengai Srinivasan, M.N.Nambiar and M.R.R.Raghu, with music by Ilaiyaraaja.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Ratchagan
programme.desc: A girl falls for a violent man who keeps taking the law into his own hands and beating people up. She wants to marry to him and eventually even he says yes, but her father has a condition that he should control his anger and work with him in his factory.

programme.title: Movie - Neethiyin Marupakkam
programme.desc: Vijayakumar falls in love with the zamindar's daughter and the two decide to marry. However, things turn sour when the zamindar kills his brother and mother, compelling him to seek revenge.

programme.title: Movie - Thudikkum Karangal
programme.desc: Balu works as a clerk in Ramesh's estate and is very loyal to him. However, when Ramesh accidentally kills Balu, the victim's brother Gopi becomes furious and decides to avenge his death.

programme.title: Movie - Unakkagave Vazhukkiren
programme.desc: Ravi Shankar stops composing music after a tragedy occurs in his life. He meets Chitra who shares similar interests. Soon, he learns about her misery and realises he is responsible for it.

programme.title: Movie - Thennavan
programme.desc: Thennavan, a successful bureaucrat, is appointed as the Chief Election Commissioner of the country by the Prime Minister himself. But his radical plan to fix the electoral system goes wrong.

programme.title: Movie - Amaravathy
programme.desc: Amravathi, a naive girl, runs away from home and finds shelter in Arjun's house. When Arjun falls in love with Amravathi, her life takes a turn.

programme.title: Movie - Jollyman
programme.desc: Jollyman is directed by KK Muthukumaar, and stars Pandiyarajan, Varshini and Abhinayashri, with music by Soundaryan.

programme.title: Movie - Mappillai Vandachu
programme.desc: Mappillai Vanthachu is a Tamil feature film starring Gautami, Rashin Rahman, Chinni Jayanth and Goundamani.

programme.title: Movie - Maasi
programme.desc: Maasi, a police officer, gets caught in the middle of a bloody rivalry between two gangsters. He also loses his wife and mother in the course. He then uses wit and strength to bring them to justice.

programme.title: Movie - Sri Rama Rajiyam
programme.desc: Rama, the son of king Dhasaratha, moves out of his kingdom with his wife Sita and brother Laxmana to live in the forest for 14 years. Ravana, the king of Lanka, kidnaps Sita. Rama defeats him in a war and gets back Sita.

programme.title: Movie - Ram Charan

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 15
programme.desc: Edwin van der Sar has faced down pressure on the biggest stages in world football, but his toughest battle came after retirement. In 2023, the legendary goalkeeper suffered a life-threatening brain haemorrhage. In this episode Edwin opens up on his recovery and looks back on his career at the top that redefined goalkeeping.

programme.title: THE ART OF... - EP 2
programme.desc: Legendary goalkeeper, Petr Cech, sits down with Will Perry to discuss the role of the goalkeeper in the Premier League and how it has changed over the years. Cech gives his unique insight into the mentality of a goalkeeper and reflects on his career before breaking down and analysing some of the key attributes that make a great goalkeeper. He also selects five iconic Premier League goalkeepers to build his dream keeper for the modern game.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 42
programme.desc: Ahead of the Tyne-Wear Derby, we catch up with former Newcastle striker Demba Ba at USL Dunkerque, where he is 'Head of Football Operations'. He opens up about the challenges and rewards of his new role, while reflecting on a remarkable career in the Premier League that took him to West Ham United, Newcastle United and Chelsea. From unforgettable moments on the pitch to shaping his approach off it, Ba shares insights into the experiences that continue to influence his vision for the game today.

programme.desc: Premier League Moments sits down with one of the most stylish players ever to grace the English top flight. David Ginola lit up the league with his flair, elegance, and unforgettable goals for Newcastle United, Tottenham Hotspur, Aston Villa, and Everton. In this episode, he reflects on the moments that defined his Premier League career, from dazzling solo runs to spectacular strikes, that made him a true fan favourite.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 26
programme.desc: We sit down for an exclusive interview with the first of two new Premier League Hall of fame inductees, Eden Hazard. A celebrated footballer who lit up the English top-flight during his illustrious career; a winner of multiple domestic and European honours, he became a true legend of the Premier League era. He reflects on his rise to the top, the moments that defined his career, and the immense pride he feels at joining the elite ranks of the Premier League's greatest ever players.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 3
programme.desc: We celebrate the greatest goalscorers in Premier League history; the icons whose instinct, power, and flair have lit up stadiums and etched their names into footballing folklore. From Alan Shearer's relentless consistency to Thierry Henry's elegance, Sergio Aguero's killer instinct to Harry Kane's rise, we relive the moments that defined an era.

programme.title: PL STORIES - EP 8
programme.desc: We celebrate the unique legacy of footballing dynasties in the Premier League; where talent, passion, and pride are passed from one generation to the next. From the iconic saves of Peter Schmeichel to the rise of his son Kasper, the goal-scoring legacy of Ian Wright carried on by son's Shaun and Bradley, and the Lampards' deep-rooted Chelsea connection, this episode explores the bonds that tie football families together.

programme.title: FS MMA Tara LaRosa vs. Amanda Buckner
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Amanda Buckner and Tara LaRosa are two of the world's best female fighters. Both are highly trained in Brazilian jiu-jitsu, Judo and Muay Thai, watch them face off in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Timothy Bradley vs. Devon Alexander
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a battle of unbeaten junior welterweights to unify the WBC and WBO world titles as Timothy Bradley, aka 'Desert Storm', (26-0, 11 KOs) faces Devon Alexander 'The Great' (21-1, 13 KOs). This fight took place at the Silverdome in Pontiac, Michigan, USA on January 29, 2011.

programme.title: Fight Quest
programme.desc: Episode 6: Bandung, Indonesia - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Pencak Silat and the Martial Art of Hands, Feet, Throws and Weapons featuring Masters Rita Suwanda and Dadang Gunawan.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Arturo Gatti vs. Carlos Baldomir
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a welterweight world championship contest featuring Arturo Gatti and Carlos Baldomir. Baldomir looks to continue his rise in the welterweight ranks. Also on the card, a classic welterweight title brawl between Andre Berto and Victor Ortiz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4 featuring Shodai, Aoiyama, Takagenji and Hakuho from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Wide World of Fights James Kirkland vs. Alfredo Angulo
programme.desc: This episode features James Kirkland as he faces Alfredo Angulo in an explosive, hard-hitting fight, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 1 of 4.

programme.title: BWF Martial Arts
programme.desc: This episode features highlights from the Men's Forms Championships as well as Girl's Weapons, Synchronized Team Forms and Boy's and Girl's Traditional Weapons.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Amir Khan vs. Danny Garcia
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is a light welterweight title unification bout between Amir Khan and Danny Garcia. Also on the card, former heavyweight champ James Kirkland.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 5 featuring Kakuryu, Endo, Mitakeumi and Hakuho from the Nagoya basho.

programme.title: Karate 1 Premier League
programme.desc: Dublin, Ireland welcomes one of the most anticipated events in Martial Arts this year as the Karate 1 Premier League returns. This will be the first Karate 1 Premier League event to take place in Dublin, with many of the top competitors in the world making the journey to Ireland for the first time and where the new Grand Winners will be crowned.

programme.title: Prison Fighters
programme.desc: This series follows former Muay Thai champion Noy Khaopan and American Cody Moberly, two inmates in a Thailand prison, who after seven years are given the chance to fight for their release. By joining a controversial government modern day Prison Fight program, murderers and felons are given the chance to fight for their freedom, and possible redemption, through the ancient tradition of Muay Thai matches. Episode 2 of 4.

programme.title: FIGHT SPORTS MMA Garreth McLellan vs. Brendan Lesar
programme.desc: This episode features coverage of the interim Middleweight Championship as Garreth 'SoldierBoy' McLellan and Brendan 'Descendant' Lesar meet in the hexagon. Bonus coverage includes Matunga Djikasa vs. Ivan Strydom and Devon Cronje vs. Guy Mongambi.

programme.title: MEGA Fights Paul Williams vs. Erislandy Lara
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a welterweight bout between former champion Paul 'The Punisher' Williams (39-2, 27 KOs) and up and comer Erislandy Lara, aka 'The American Dream", 15-0, 10 KOs). The fight took place at Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City, New Jersey, USA, on July 9, 2011.

programme.title: American Ninja Warrior
programme.desc: The qualifying rounds conclude at the Port of Los Angeles in San Pedro, Cal., before the historic battleship USS Iowa, where a very special all active duty and retired military members tackle such obstacles as the Log Runner and I Beam Cross.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this episode we see the best of the Judo Grand Slam from Ekaterinburg, speak with number 1 ranked fighter Khasan Khalmurzaev about his return to Judo, and show Soichi Hashimoto's success using his signature throw.

programme.title: XMA
programme.desc: In this episode we focus on the martial art of breaking and how the techniques are fine-tuned with technology.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Jose Miguel Cotto
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Saul (Canelo) Alvarez defending his NABF welterweight title against Jose Miguel Cotto, Alvarez's final bout before rising through the ranks and championships of the WBC. Also on the card, a heavyweight kickboxing clash between Errol Zimmerman vs. Rico Verhoeven.

Show 1 featuring Goeido, Ichinojo, Daieisho and Kotoeko from the Aki basho, 2019.

programme.desc: This episode features an undisputed middleweight title fight between Sergio Martinez and Matthew Macklin, as well as kickboxing, sumo and more!

programme.title: Gallagher Premiership
programme.desc: The best of the latest action from the Gallagher Premiership.

programme.title: URC Benetton v Ospreys
programme.desc: Ospreys make the trip to the Monigo for this URC encounter as they take on Benetton.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 67
programme.desc: The Teletubbies enjoy doing 'Round and Round the Garden', especially the end of the rhyme where they all tickle each other. The Tiddlytubbies have tickly fun too.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'cake' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 17
programme.desc: Messy accidentally removes the brakes from Mayor Oki's carnival float, but it turns out he really needs them. Will Messy be able to stop the runaway float?

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Preston's automated scooter tour of Swoppiton doesn't go as planned. Mojo and Bo must find a way to chase down and scoop up those scooters, and get the tour back on track!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 25
programme.desc: Dad agrees to take Bluey and Bingo to the shops to buy an ice-cream if they can get him into the car. Only problem is... he's just entered 'Ragdoll' mode!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 24
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo love to video chat with Muffin and Socks so they can all draw pictures together. When Muffin won't give Socks a turn, the kids discover what happens when you hog.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 12
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 11
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Today at Squirrel Club, there are all sorts of comparisons to learn - from small to smallest, hungry to hungriest, and Duggee to Duggiest!

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: How many siblings does Norrie have? What's Duggee's favourite badge? What does everyone do on Fridays? Squirrel Club has the answers!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 3
programme.desc: Can the Go Jetters save a rare bird's nest and find a lost trophy?

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 23
programme.desc: Playing 'Shops' is the best game ever for Bluey and her friends - if they can ever get started! With Bluey questioning the rules and changing who's who, they might be here all day!

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 26
programme.desc: Inside Bingo's dream, Bingo and Floppy have an intergalactic adventure, while the rest of her sleep-deprived family try to navigate Bingo's non-stop night-time bedhopping.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 37
programme.desc: The Heelers and Lucky's family get together to watch the big game, a fun family experiences that gets a little tense.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 38
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: Andy's Aquatic Adventures (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Andy heads to the Atlantic Ocean near Florida in search of bottlenose dolphins.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 7
programme.desc: Bella plays funny games with Lift using her colourful towel. Together, they visit Hettie in the Ice Disco, who uses a big towel to make up a new dance - the Butterfly Boogie!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 39
programme.desc: The hungry Squirrels turn to Duggee when they aren't sure what to eat. Fortunately, he has his cookbook The Clubhouse Kitchen: Tasty Bites for Hungry Squirrels.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 38
programme.desc: The Squirrels can learn more about nature and wildlife if they follow five easy steps: watch carefully, stay at a distance, don't interfere, be patient and alert, and stay quiet.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S4) - EP 37
programme.desc: The Squirrels are causing a bit too much mess in the clubhouse, so Duggee explains that they need to think more carefully about what they are doing.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: The team goes where no Go Jetter has gone before, when Glitch tries to launch into space.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 8
programme.desc: The Go Jetters get a sinking feeling when Glitch turns the canals of Venice into roads.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S24) - EP 17
programme.desc: Inventor Ruth has a new steam powered car to try out. But Cleo the car is headstrong and when Thomas challenges her to a race she takes some risks to guarantee a win.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 36
programme.desc: Sarah & Duck do a spot of gardening.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S3) - EP 38
programme.desc: Sarah and Duck join Scooter Boy at the cinema to watch his favourite film.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 11
programme.desc: Cynthia asks Stanley to teach her to fly an aeroplane for Fifi's birthday. Stanley constructs a flight simulator and has the help of their friends to put her through her paces.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Myrtle wants everyone to see her new dance so enlists Stanley to gather some friends. However, the stereo breaks so they have to make their own music.

programme.title: Number 1 Newton Avenue (S1) - EP 10
programme.desc: Freddie buries a pile of acorns into a small hole he's dug in Aunt Fee's garden. Aunt Fee is excited to go on a treasure hunt, but first needs to finish her map of the garden.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 21
programme.desc: JoJo wants to bake banana loaf for Jared, who's coming to dinner, but the bananas are too green. It's time for a Gran Gran plan - what can they make with green bananas?

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 20
programme.desc: With only five minutes to play 'Driving', Bluey and Mum race against the clock to buy milk for a grumpy guest and have to escape an angry shopkeeper.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 21
programme.desc: Tired of being told what to do, Bluey and Bingo enlist their giant invisible friend Tina to show Mum and Dad who's boss. Now they can do anything they want, until Mum and Dad rebel.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 22
programme.desc: Bluey promises her customer, Bingo, the best tour ever in a game of Whale Watching, but they need Mum and Dad to join in, and they are too tired to play after a late night.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 26
programme.desc: It's time for the annual Animal Obstacle Course Race. The animals need to work together in teams to complete the course.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 25
programme.desc: The Squirrels are rushing around, so Duggee shows them how to take a slower pace.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 27

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret "Echo" Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the "keys" in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret "Echo" Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) - and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 45

He slithers far, far away to the desert where he bumps into Camel and learns that every animal needs a friend. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: The evil General Morando launches a coup on the alien planet Akiridion-5. In the ensuing battle, the planet's King and Queen are severely injured, and their surviving son Krel and daughter Aja escape the planet with military commander, Varvatos Vex. They seek refuge on a backwater planet: Earth.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Aja, Krel, and Vex explore Earth looking for technology to repair their ship. When the high school Principal demands to meet Aja and Krel's guardians, the Royal teens transform two maintenance robots (Blanks) to pose as their "human" parents.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 74
programme.desc: After Crispin Biscuits changes the Baby Love economy to reward companies for bringing in baby hate, Boss Baby is forced to make himself the most hated baby in town to save their startup company. Meanwhile, Tina needs to end Crispin Biscuits’ attacks on their company before she can finally hang up her boss role and retire to a life of cuddle time with daddy and mommy.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 75
programme.desc: With his identity as a fugitive businessman exposed, Boss Baby has been hiding out in the lawless land of Canada. But he’s forced back into action over a new crisis with Baby Love: several criminals have copycatted Boss’s fugitive strategy, somehow turning themselves into babies to hide out from the law. While Tina works on exposing these new fake baby criminals to the world, Boss makes a dangerous journey across Canada to sneak back over the U.S. border.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 76
programme.desc: After getting caught at the border, Boss, Tim, JJ, and Pip have to organize an escape from a "former novelty restaurant turned interrogation facility" using only the four phone calls they’ve been given. Meanwhile, Tina has a plan for Dez to infiltrate the criminal baby organization to break them up from the inside, but it’s complicated when Tina’s new assistant Temp Baby Aubrey accidentally takes over Dez’s undercover baby criminal role.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Po and Blade must convince a deceased comic book writer's son to give them information about an unreleased comic that may point them toward the next weapon: a whip of fire. However, after the events of 103 Po is now a wanted criminal, so the Emperor's Forbidden Company arrives and captures him. Torn between saving Po and the mission she's sworn to complete, Blade flees and abandons Po.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy S3 - EP 67

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy S3 - EP 68
programme.desc: After the PALs encourage Maricela to make new friends, she forms the exclusive "Poshy Posse" with Priya, Sahir and Alex.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy S3 - EP 69
programme.desc: Someone stole Bebe's gavel and used it to break a window at the academy! Everyone seems to suspect Alex ... but Pru is certain he's innocent.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: When the Croods return to Ahhh! Valley they find that the evil Brood family has taken over and Grug must work with fellow Valleyites to defeat them

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 48

programme.title: Australian Story (2026) - EP 6
programme.desc: From Arnhem Land to rock stardom, Yothu Yindi's Witiyana Marika was destined to take centre stage. Now, at a crucial time for his community, he's shed his dreadlocks and emerged as a leader of his people.

programme.title: Gardening Australia S37 - EP 5
programme.desc: Costa visits pop legend Leo Sayer in his rose-filled country garden, Sophie reveals her new outback patch, Guest Presenter Thanh the Fruit Nerd joins a feijoa fanatic, and we meet an ecologist growing tiny urban forests.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw S5 - EP 85
programme.desc: It's Easy Entertaining with The Cook Up, and Adam is celebrating Diwali, the Festival of Lights, with chefs Gunjan Aylawadi and Nagesh Seethiah.

programme.title: The World (2026) - EP 46
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 60
programme.desc: As the day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato bring you the latest news, interviews and the day's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy with sport and Nate Byrne with weather.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026) - EP 60
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings (2026) - EP 60
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: Diabolical: The Epstein Files
programme.desc: It's the scandal that shocked Americans and rocked the Trump administration. A legal and political saga that shattered fundamental beliefs that all are equal in the eyes of the law. What do the Epstein Files reveal?

programme.title: Landline (2026) - EP 5
programme.desc: A new high fibre wheat variety that functions like conventional flour; and the role of buffel grass in Australia's multi-billion dollar beef industry.

programme.title: Four Corners (2025) - EP 32
programme.desc: The race is on to find the minerals needed to enable the world's transition to clean energy and vast reserves of those minerals lie at the bottom of the Pacific. But scientists warn it risks catastrophic damage to our oceans.

programme.title: Media Watch (2026) - EP 8
programme.desc: Allegations of violence against Antony Catalano amid a steady decline of his regional news empire. Google AI summaries an opportunity for big news players but unlucky for little guys. Crikey wipe articles that fail AI rules.

programme.title: How Deadly World S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Nature nerd, Dr Ann Jones, explains the sometimes terrifying and often hilarious behaviour of the world's most dangerous water animal.

programme.title: Grand Designs Transformations S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: On the Mornington Peninsula, an overgrown sloping bush block is transformed into a family retreat designed to embrace its natural surrounds, while a heritage-listed mid-century classic home in Sydney gets a modern upgrade.

programme.title: Dream Gardens S2 - EP 5
programme.desc: Simon and Fleur Ansell relish mid-century modern architecture. They have the house, now they want the garden to match. But can they create a contemporary design in sync with its vintage roots?

programme.title: Iconic Australia S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Upon their return from WWII, one of the first things Australian servicemen did was go to The Pub, an institution as old as British colonisation. In 1945 The Pub, like Australia, was on the brink of sweeping change.

programme.title: Wang Gungwu Lecture 2026
programme.desc: Professor Kelvin Kong delivers the 2026 Wang Gungwu Lecture. Each year the lecture celebrates the life and work of a prominent Chinese Australian.

programme.title: Play On S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Episode two sees two of the world's toughest games: footy in the Tiwi Islands and Kabaddi. A highlight for host Paul Kennedy is witnessing the monumental return to Bathurst Islands of favourite son Willie Rioli Jnr.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show (2026) - EP 8
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: The Pacific (2026) - EP 1
programme.desc: The Pacific is back for 2026. This week: Tongan women speak up about harassment in kava clubs, families in Port Moresby face eviction, plus how Melbourne's Storm Waka program is changing young Pasifika lives. (Return)

programme.title: Foreign Correspondent (2026) - EP 4
programme.desc: After Donald Trump ordered the capture of Venezuelan President Nicolas Maduro the focus shifted to the country's vast oil reserves. Now the US is trying to revive Venezuela's oil industry. But who will be the beneficiaries?

programme.desc: Iran warns of retaliatory strikes if Trump follows through on his threat to attack Iranian power plants. So, what's Iran's next move? Plus former MMA fighter Markwayne Mullin spars with Senators at his confirmation hearing.

programme.title: Happily Ever After: Fairy Tales For Every Child S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: Daphne Zuniga is the voice of Cinderella and dances to a mariachi beat at the prince's ball in this Latino retelling. With Edward James and Jimmy Smits.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: When a high school senior discovers a gas-guzzling creature, he embarks on a journey to reunite his new-found friend with his family.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Lazlo's friendship with Raj suffers because Raj has only one thing on his mind: marshmallows!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Scoutmaster Lumpus is determined to finally catch a fish, and he certainly doesn't need the Jelly Beans to help him reel one in. Or does he?

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: The Squirrel Scouts discover that the Jelly Beans are actually from another planet and take them hostage to find out more.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Lazlo organizes a dance with the Squirrel Scouts so that Lumpus can spend time with Jane Doe, but when the big night arrives, Lumpus is so nervous that his body literally explodes from fear.

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: Lumpus discovers that Clam is not only a child genius, but he's also Lumpus' meal ticket to a life of fame and fortune!

programme.title: Camp Lazlo S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: When Edward excludes Lazlo from his secret club, Lazlo creates his own club out of nothing!

programme.title: Squirrel Boy S2 - EP 13

programme.desc: Mr. J is disgusted with the daily newspaper.

programme.desc: Butch, the bully squirrel from the park, takes up residence in the Johnson house.

programme.title: Top Chef S17 - EP 14
programme.desc: In an epic Italian showdown, the final three All Stars cook the meal of their lives in an effort to take home the ultimate title and prize. programme.title: The Exchange - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC’s ‘The Exchange’ is the newsroom-based program for today’s investor. The show focuses on in-depth reporting around the most important and interesting stories to today’s markets and investors. CNBC’s deep roster of skilled reporters, guided by anchor Kelly Evans, provide actionable information to viewers as they make daily investment decisions.

programme.title: The Exchange - EP 2

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 1
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. Airing CNBC’s award-winning business news coverage, "Power Lunch" delves into the economy, markets, politics, technology and more.

programme.title: Power Lunch - EP 2
programme.desc: CNBC's Kelly Evans and Brian Sullivan take you through the heart of the business day bringing you the latest developments and instant analysis on the stocks and stories driving the day’s agenda. programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 1
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. Hosted by CNBC’s Scott Wapner, "Closing Bell" guides you through the most important hour of the trading day. The show takes a close-up look at how the markets are moving, what’s driving them and how investors are reacting.

programme.title: Closing Bell - EP 2
programme.desc: Anything can happen between the bells of the trading day. But what happens during the last hour could be what matters most. programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime - EP 1
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. "Closing Bell: Overtime" takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. Big investors, smart strategists and top money managers debate actionable ideas and the big market themes of the day, and get viewers ready for tomorrow’s trading day.

programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals why ancient Greece was the birthplace of so many big ideas. She decodes the Parthenon's geometry, sails the Aegean with ancient tools and is swept up in a riotous festival.

programme.desc: Hannah Fry journeys to Ireland, her ancestral homeland, tracing the impact of the nation's modern economic transformation and its connections to the land and sea.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Hannah Fry reveals how Iceland's geological extremes help shape its culture. She meets scientists predicting lava flows and harnessing geothermal power, and even rides along ancient Viking trails.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Hannah explores Vietnam. From the vibrancy of Ho Chi Minh City to a muddy prawn harvest in the Mekong Delta and the misty hilltops of Sapa, she reveals a nation embracing change.

programme.title: The Infinite Explorer with Hannah Fry S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Hannah Fry travels to Spain to decode its history and culture. She learns about the rhythms of flamenco, a mountain whistle language and the hidden symbolism in its urban planning.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Scientists are developing powerful magnets to enable clean energy sources like fusion. But China's dominance of the supply chain for rare-earth magnets threatens their global availability.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We explore the world of biocomputing-where scientists are laying the foundation for a field that may blur the lines between the biological and synthetic.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Geothermal has been the underdog of the energy industry - but that may be about to change as new startups use fracking technologies to expand potential geothermal sites.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: Scientists and entrepreneurs are testing radical ideas like solar radiation management and ocean fertilisation - and finding funding for it.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Flying cars have largely remained science fiction, until now. A new generation of electrified aircraft is attracting the attention of investors and venture capitalists around the world.

programme.title: Bloomberg Primer S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Governments and entrepreneurs are racing to commercialize the moon. These efforts could unlock a new, deep-space economy. But to return and stay will require the highest levels of innovation.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 1

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: We speak with Pranav Yadav, CEO of Neuro-Insight, about the marketing intelligence his company is gleaning from neuroscience.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 3

programme.desc: McLaren Racing CEO Zak Brown discusses the technology, data and effort required to propel the McLaren brand onto the modern F1 stage and into living rooms around the globe.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: Stephan Pretorious, chief technology officer of WPP, unpacks the world of generative artificial intelligence and its potential impact, both positive and negative, on marketing.

programme.title: Quantum Marketing S1 - EP 6

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. With separate editions out of Asia, Europe, Africa and the Americas, Global Business features analysts and news-makers supported through a global network of correspondents. programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. programme.desc: Akan-Mashu: Akan-Mashu National Park is home to Lake Akan, Lake Kussharo, and Lake Mashu. It provides unique winter sights and the opportunity to experience the indigenous Ainu culture.

programme.title: A Culture Built with Wood
programme.desc: Kiso: The Kiso region in Nagano Prefecture is covered by coniferous forests that have been tended by human hands over generations - join us as we savour the rich culture they've shaped.

programme.title: Ukiyo-e Edo-Life
programme.desc: Airing Laundry at the Local Well: It's summer and a group of women have gathered at the local well - we learn about the different techniques and tools used to wash and dry different types of kimonos.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: This programme gives you comprehensive coverage of events in Japan and Asia, explaining the day's developments and what is behind them.

programme.title: Reiho: Respect in Practice
programme.desc: The Ogasawara family has taught Japanese etiquette through daily action for 800 years - we learn how this cultivates self-awareness and understanding of others.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: The Kii Mountains are home to dynamic landscapes formed by a volcanic eruption 14 million years ago. Through beautiful time-lapse footage, we show the area's rock formations and rich ecosystem.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Japanology Plus
programme.desc: Adam Smith is a potter from England who follows a self-sufficient lifestyle in the mountains of Nagano Prefecture - he creates rich natural colours by using handmade glazes made from local plants.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK World-Japan's flagship hourly news programme delivers the latest world news, business and weather with a focus on Japan and the rest of Asia.

programme.title: Japan Railway Journal
programme.desc: Railway Technical Research Institute leads R&D for Japan's railways, from the JR companies to smaller regional lines. See the cutting-edge research that's shaping the future of rail transport.

programme.title: Core Kyoto

programme.title: Hello Doctor - EP 1614
programme.desc: The program invites doctors from different fields to talk about big and small things about doctors, break the stereotype of doctors and provide audiences with information on medical health from a relaxed and pleasant perspective!

programme.title: Wassup Man! Let's Chill! Let' Go Play! - EP 10
programme.desc: A trip without a purpose, just go on a whim, so simple, are you willing to join us? A journey that witnesses the friendship of men begins!Let's go! Bring a simple bag, ride a hot-blooded motorcycle, and have fun traveling and charging.

programme.title: Dee Girls Talk - EP 466
programme.desc: Hosted by Dee Hsu, the most queenly artist in the entertainment industry, and partnered with the humorous assistant host Patrick, each episode invites many of the most popular and topical artists and Internet celebrities to appear on the show. Through Dee Hsu Her profound and spicy hosting skills stirred up unparalleled "laughter" with the guests.

programme.title: No.57 Dream Boulevard - Reserve Your Dreams - EP 1927
programme.desc: More professional, richer, and more diversified car model information is shared with the audience.

programme.title: ShinyFoodDiary - EP 138
programme.desc: The host visits various places in a walking and themed way, focusing on what is most fashionable among young people nowadays.Check in on FB and IG to create new highlights and online clicks, not only delicious food, but also in-depth introduction.Introduce the cultural customs and festivals of various places.

programme.title: All Star Quiz Show - EP 49
programme.desc: The puzzle reality program, with the curator Sam Tseng as the knowledge gatekeeper, tests every artist star who comes to challenge the Jiugongge puzzle game. programme.title: Made In Taiwan
programme.desc: "Made In Taiwan" records the rich and diverse history and humanities, local specialties, natural landscapes, as well as special ecology, plant research and other natural ecology, character close-ups, mountain scenery and etc., as the "Made In Taiwan" theme content. programme.title: Kangsi Coming
programme.desc: Lead by Kevin Tsai and Dee Hsu, who never fail to entertain their audience by the fast-paced, humorous and fully self-aware hosting style. programme.title: Super Followers
programme.desc: Join Jacky Wu and Sandy Wu as they bridge generation gaps and co-host this programme that integrates intellectual interviews to present a unique and high-quality variety talk show!

programme.title: Hit the Headlines
programme.desc: Headline Talk Show is a political show co-hosted by anchor Zhou Yuqin and director of the political center Lin Jiayuan. "Headline Talk Show" is the most daring-speak-out TV show. We speak out your voice!

programme.desc: Each episode of Big Boys Club invites singers, artistes as well as people from different walks of life as guests onto the show, participating in relaxed interviews and discussing current trends.

programme.title: The Kwoks And What - EP 23
programme.desc: After single-handedly raising her children and her grandchildren, seasoned artisan and instructor Kwok-Law Mei-lan discovers everybody's issues just before her 70th birthday.

programme.title: Pretty Dangerous & What's On Today - EP 22
programme.desc: Undercover cop Pan Yifeng leads three elite female agents - the Sherlock-like Shen Jiaqi, martial artist Jiang Miaozhi, and data whiz Tong Xiaoru - to bust a "Fairy Dust" drug ring near tycoon Liu Biao's circle.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2770
programme.desc: Hung Shu-Kan owns a logistics business. The only thing on his mind is the well-being of his three daughters. His eldest daughter has moved abroad, but his second youngest daughter, Yuek-Shui, is still single. She and her little sister Sum-Yue often squabble, putting their father in a dilemma.

programme.desc: Ji Man loses her memory after a fall and awakens as the hated wife of Minister Ning Yuxuan, but turns her fate around through wit, helping him win imperial favour. Together they defeat powerful enemies and overcome political plots, finally finding love amid hardship.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 848
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2175
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Fight For Love - EP 20
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Falsely accused noblewoman Chu Yu (Victoria Song) teams up with Wei Yun (Ding Yuxi) to uncover a military massacre’s truth; amid war and palace intrigue, they fall in love while defending their homeland.

programme.title: Homeland Guardian - EP 8
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Legendary Hong Kong police officer Ho Ho Fai (Jordan Chan), known for his role as one of the Three Tigers, faces a dramatic fall from grace after a failed mission. Joining the Special Duties Unit, he and his team, fight to uncover and thwart a plot against Hong Kong’s financial system.

programme.title: Legend of the Magnate - EP 36
programme.desc: [With English and Chinese subtitles] Gu Ping Yuan (Chen Xiao), framed and exiled after failing the imperial exam, escapes with a salt caravan and rises as a daring merchant. He uncovers hidden plots, and discovers that the conspiracy that ruined him was actually aimed at the Li family.

programme.title: Lo And Behold - EP 2176
programme.desc: This story revolves around the Hung family, their working lives and friends.

programme.title: Hilarious Family - EP 13
programme.desc: This heartwarming drama tells the story of Du Ruyu (Liu Lin), a single mother who has been widowed for 18 years, raising her four daughters, each with very different personalities, on her own. The family is filled with both laughter and tears.

programme.title: Golden City (Ep 801-850) VVD Mandarin - EP 848
programme.desc: Set in the 60s in Jioufen, the story tells how three sworn brothers conquer the world with their bare hands. While connecting romance from the previous generation to the shared emotions with the present, the drama explores differences in generational values.

programme.title: The King Of Snooker - EP 12
programme.desc: The all-conquering snooker player YAU YAT KIU (Cheng Siu Chau, Adam) takes everyone by surprise when he suddenly retires from the snooker world. This comes as a huge disappointed to her daughter YAU KA KAN (Niki Chow), who has always wanted to follow in his footsteps. She feels bewildered too, for although KIU pretends he does not care about the snooker any more, he has set up an extremely difficult game in his restaurant.

programme.title: Can't Buy Me Love - EP 2
programme.desc: Reluctant to marry into the Tibetan royal family, the willful Princess CHIU YEUNG (Charmaine Sheh) has to find herself a husband as soon as possible. Owner of a gold store TING LOI-HEI (Kwan Kuk Ying) recommends her second and third sons, KAM DOR-LUK (Moses Chan) and KAM DOR-SHAU (Wong Ho Yin) to the Princess, hoping that the royal marriage would bring them out of financial crisis and save their family business somehow.

programme.title: Unchained Medley - EP 7
programme.desc: Pop musician Ding Yat-chun (Owen Cheung) is often troubled by nightmares. He then gets embroiled in a plagiarism scandal, so he moves to a small village for the time being as he also wants to relax. Yat-chun unwittingly opens an old Cantonese opera costume trunk in the village house, releasing the ghost of opera diva Wan Lau-fong (Katy Kung). In the 1990s, Lau-fong was a Cantonese opera diva, but she passed away due to some accident. Lau-fong has forgotten almost everything about her human life.

programme.title: Rosy Business - EP 18
programme.desc: HONG PO KEI’s (Tang Shui Man, Sheren) engagement with Wuxi rice baron TSEUNG KIU (Yueh Wah) broke off many years ago when a natural disaster hit the country. Later when the country was running out of food supply her whole family was killed and she become a criminal. Over the years, KEI has never got over KIU. She has been trying to prove he is not as heartless as the others think. Fate has it that they meet again and she becomes his fourth wife.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 26
programme.desc: Wing Tai Lung is the silk kingdom in Canton during the early years of Republic China. Its owner POON WING-NIN (Yueh Hua), because of his advanced age, has handed over the charge to his elder son POON KA-HIN (Evergreen Mak) and daughter POON HAU-YEE (Hong Wah). Out of the blue, HAU-YEE commits suicide, so his second son POON KA-YEUNG (Steven Ma), who was serving as a combat medic, returns to his hometown, taking over the reins.

programme.title: Storm In A Cocoon - EP 27
programme.desc: Wing Tai Lung is the silk kingdom in Canton during the early years of Republic China.
